isolation.boundary: Local app/browser only, no code changes

steps.action: Load Night view and capture collapsed strip
steps.expected: Collapsed strip shows compact chart + label/value state
steps.observed: Heart Rate strip rendered as compact row with label/value and chart in collapsed state.

steps.expected: Expanded view shows larger chart with y-axis/grid/markers
steps.observed: Expanded state appeared (button aria changed to 'click to collapse') and chart displayed axes/grid/point markers.

steps.expected: Component returns to compact state
steps.observed: Strip returned to collapsed state (button aria changed back to 'click to expand').

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed (agent-browser errors returned no entries)

assertions.title: InsightCard with dismiss and conditional rendering

steps.action: Open date with visible insight card
steps.expected: Insight card shows narrative, related metrics, and dismiss control
steps.observed: Insight card rendered with narrative text and related metric list; dismiss control present.

steps.expected: Dismiss control is keyboard focusable and has aria-label
steps.observed: Dismiss button reported aria-label 'Dismiss insight: Below-average sleep score', tabIndex=0, disabled=false.

steps.expected: Card is removed from UI
steps.observed: Card disappeared after dismiss; DOM check reported insightArticleCount=0 and dismissButtonCount=0.

assertions.title: DateNavigation with picker, arrows, presets, and view toggle

steps.expected: Calendar opens and selected date updates context
steps.observed: Calendar opened and URL updated to ?view=night&date=2026-04-04.

steps.expected: Forward arrow disabled at today
steps.observed: At 2026-04-05 (today), Next day button was disabled as expected.

steps.expected: View toggle/presets preserve date context and update range
steps.observed: View switched to Recovery/Trend with date preserved; 7D and 1Y presets updated trend state.

steps.expected: Back arrow disables at earliest data date
steps.observed: Back arrow remained enabled even on 2025-01-01 and older no-data dates (did not clamp/disable at earliest data boundary).

assertions.issues: Earliest-date boundary behavior does not match contract: backward navigation never disables at earliest data date.

assertions.title: Loading, empty, and error states handled gracefully

steps.expected: Meaningful empty-state message
steps.observed: Displayed 'No data available for this night' with explanatory text.

steps.expected: Partial content remains usable with metric/state messaging
steps.observed: Night view rendered available strips and summary while showing missing sleep-stage text.

steps.expected: User-friendly error + retry while app shell stays usable
steps.observed: Displayed 'Failed to load night data' and Retry button; navigation shell remained functional.

steps.action: Delay API responses to observe loading state
steps.expected: Skeleton/spinner placeholders visible during fetch
steps.observed: No progressbar/spinner/skeleton/loading text detected during delayed fetch (progressbars=0, spinners=0).

evidence.consoleErrors: none observed from agent-browser errors command
evidence.network: GET /api/views/night?date=2026-04-04 -> 200; simulated aborted /api/views/night requests produced fetch failure UI

assertions.issues: Loading placeholder requirement was not met in observed delayed-fetch state (no skeleton/spinner surfaced).

steps.expected: Charts/metrics expose accessible labels and delta meaning
steps.observed: Metric strip control had descriptive aria-label; summary statuses exposed text like 'Sleep Score: worse, down 7.2 from average'.

steps.expected: Dismiss button focusable and activatable via keyboard
steps.observed: Dismiss button focused and activated using Space; insight card removed.

steps.action: Validate date navigation keyboard access/focus visibility
steps.expected: Date controls keyboard accessible with visible focus
steps.observed: Tab reached 'Previous day' control; Enter activated navigation; computed focus style included visible ring box-shadow.

assertions.title: Responsive layout at desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

steps.expected: Desktop stacked strips with shared alignment and minimal scroll
steps.observed: Desktop layout rendered expected stacked dashboard panels.

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow/content cutoff
steps.observed: Tablet had no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=768).

steps.expected: Single-column full-width layout; compact markers; data reachable by vertical scroll
steps.observed: Markers collapsed to compact icon form, but document had horizontal overflow (scrollWidth 478 > clientWidth 375) and was horizontally scrollable by 103px.

assertions.issues: Mobile viewport violates full-width expectation due reproducible horizontal overflow/horizontal scrolling.

assertions.title: Fresh baselines render as normal range bands on frontend

steps.action: Load Night view and expand Heart Rate chart
steps.expected: Baseline band shaded across chart width at expected bounds and low opacity
steps.observed: Chart showed filled area with fill-opacity 0.6; no low-opacity (<=0.15) baseline-band element identified.

steps.action: Verify API baseline payload for target date
steps.expected: Heart-rate baseline values present to drive band (example avg=61, stddev=5)
steps.observed: Night API baselines included deep_sleep/hrv/rhr/sleep_score only; heart_rate baseline key absent.

evidence.network: GET /api/views/night?date=2026-04-04 -> 200; baselines keys: [deep_sleep, hrv, rhr, sleep_score] (heart_rate missing)

assertions.issues: Contract not met: expected Heart Rate baseline band behavior/opacity could not be validated because heart_rate baseline data was absent and rendered fill did not match <=15% baseline-band requirement.

frictions.description: Direct /dashboard access redirected to /sign-in despite mock-auth expectation in guidance.
frictions.resolution: Generated a local mock __session token for user_test_001 and set it in the assigned browser session cookie.

frictions.description: Pointer clicks on the Heart Rate strip were intermittently blocked by overlaid marker elements.
frictions.resolution: Used keyboard focus + Enter to toggle chart expansion/collapse reliably.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned no captured requests for this session.
frictions.resolution: Collected supplementary network/status evidence via authenticated local curl requests.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-UICMP-001, VAL-UICMP-002, VAL-UICMP-005) and 4 failed (VAL-UICMP-003, VAL-UICMP-004, VAL-UICMP-006, VAL-CROSS-007).
